languages.text: {n}Себериан молчит несколько секунд.{/n} "Сожаления о содеянном — путь в никуда. Сосредоточься на настоящем — каким бы мрачным оно не рисовалось в эту минуту".
{n}Seberian is silent for several seconds.{/n} "Regret for what has been done is a path to nowhere. Focus on the present, however grim it may appear at this moment."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан молчит несколько секунд.{/n} "Сожаления о содеянном — путь в никуда. Сосредоточься на настоящем — каким бы мрачным оно не рисовалось в эту минуту".

{n}Seberian is silent for several seconds.{/n} "Regret for what has been done is a path to nowhere. Focus on the present, however grim it may appear at this moment."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安沉默了几秒。{/n}“为已发生之事懊悔没有任何意义。着眼于当下吧，不管此刻它有多么糟糕。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian is silent for several seconds.{/n} "Regret for what has been done is a path to nowhere. Focus on the present, however grim it may appear at this moment."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安沉默了几秒。{/n}“为已发生之事懊悔没有任何意义。着眼于当下吧，不管此刻它有多么糟糕。”

languages.text: {n}Seberian tarda varios segundos en tomar la palabra.{/n} «Arrepentirnos por lo sucedido no lleva a ninguna parte. Centrémonos en el presente, por difícil que parezca la situación».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian is silent for several seconds.{/n} "Regret for what has been done is a path to nowhere. Focus on the present, however grim it may appear at this moment."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian tarda varios segundos en tomar la palabra.{/n} «Arrepentirnos por lo sucedido no lleva a ninguna parte. Centrémonos en el presente, por difícil que parezca la situación».

languages.text: {n}Seberian se tait quelques instants.{/n} « Les regrets ne mènent à rien. Concentrez-vous sur le présent, aussi sinistre puisse-t-il vous paraître. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian is silent for several seconds.{/n} "Regret for what has been done is a path to nowhere. Focus on the present, however grim it may appear at this moment."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian se tait quelques instants.{/n} « Les regrets ne mènent à rien. Concentrez-vous sur le présent, aussi sinistre puisse-t-il vous paraître. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian, birkaç saniye sessiz kalıyor.{/n} "Yapılanlar için pişmanlık duymak hiçbir yere varmayan bir yoldur. Şu an ne kadar kasvetli görünse de şimdiki zamana odaklan."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian is silent for several seconds.{/n} "Regret for what has been done is a path to nowhere. Focus on the present, however grim it may appear at this moment."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, birkaç saniye sessiz kalıyor.{/n} "Yapılanlar için pişmanlık duymak hiçbir yere varmayan bir yoldur. Şu an ne kadar kasvetli görünse de şimdiki zamana odaklan."

languages.text: {n}Seberian schweigt einige Sekunden.{/n} "Reue wegen dem, was war, führt zu nichts. Konzentriert Euch auf die Gegenwart, egal, wie düster sie Euch gerade erscheint."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian is silent for several seconds.{/n} "Regret for what has been done is a path to nowhere. Focus on the present, however grim it may appear at this moment."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian schweigt einige Sekunden.{/n} "Reue wegen dem, was war, führt zu nichts. Konzentriert Euch auf die Gegenwart, egal, wie düster sie Euch gerade erscheint."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは数秒間沈黙した。{/n} 「過去に後悔することは、行き止まりである。今この瞬間、どんなに暗くても、今に焦点を当てるのだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian is silent for several seconds.{/n} "Regret for what has been done is a path to nowhere. Focus on the present, however grim it may appear at this moment."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは数秒間沈黙した。{/n} 「過去に後悔することは、行き止まりである。今この瞬間、どんなに暗くても、今に焦点を当てるのだ。」
